case_title: LEONID PINSKI VS. ALEXANDER VILDERMAN DDS et al

docket_entries.description: REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOSITION TO PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION AND TO STAY ACTION FILED BY DEFENDANT VILDERMAN DDS, ALEXANDER INDIVIDUALLY

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT ALEXANDER VILDERMAN, D.D.S., DBA CITY DENTAL'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY THE ACTION. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. THE PETITION WAS TIMELY SUBMITTED AND SERVED. THERE IS A STRONG PUBLIC POLICY FAVORING ARBITRATION AND PLAINTIFF SIGNED THE AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT DEFENDANT HAS WAIVED HIS RIGHT TO ARBITRATE THIS DISPUTE. DEFENDANT, BY SUBPOENAING DENTAL RECORDS, HAS NOT SUBSTANTIALLY INVOKED THE LITIGATION MACHINERY, AND NO PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF IS SHOWN. THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT SUFFICIENTLY COMPLIES WITH CCP SECTION 1295, AND PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT ALLEGES AN ONGOING RELATIONSHIP SUCH THAT THE AGREEMENT APPLIES TO THIS DISPUTE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-30-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ALEXANDER VILDERMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY THE ACTION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 30, 2010. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT VILDERMAN DDS, ALEXANDER, DBA CITY DENTAL PETITION TO REQ. THAT COURT APPOINT A NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR. TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED - DEFENDANTS' PETITION TO APPOINT NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR IS GRANTED. PER CCP 1281.6, THE PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER SO THAT THEY MAY SUBMIT A LIST OF NO FEWER THAN EIGHT PROPOSED ARBITRATORS (WITH EACH SIDE SUBMITTING AT LEAST FOUR) NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 25. UPON RECEIPT OF THE LIST, THE COURT WILL THEN ISSUE A NOTICE BY MAIL TO COUNSEL NOMINATING FIVE PERSONS FROM THE LIST AND THE PARTIES WILL HAVE TEN DAYS TO AGREE ON AN ARBITRATOR. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

Petition To Req. That Court Appoint A Neutral Arbitrator
Off Calendar Oct-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anna Pinski, Esq., Law Offices, 510-209-2662, for Plaintiff and opposing party

No other appearance. Tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANT VILDERMAN DDS, ALEXANDER, DBA CITY DENTAL Petition To Req. That Court Appoint A Neutral Arbitrator - Defendants' Petition to Appoint Neutral Arbitrator is granted. Per CCP 1281.6, the parties shall meet and confer so that they may submit a list of no fewer than eight proposed arbitrators (with each side submitting at least four) no later than October 25. Upon receipt of the list, the court will then issue a notice by mail to counsel nominating five persons from the list and the parties will have ten days to agree on an arbitrator. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Ntc And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay The Action ;
Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT ALEXANDER VILDERMAN, D.D.S., dba CITY DENTAL'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY THE ACTION.

APPEARANCES: Kathleen Duggan, Esq. of Roper, Majeski, Kohn Bentley 650/364-8200 for deft & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. THE PETITION WAS TIMELY SUBMITTED AND SERVED. THERE IS A STRONG PUBLIC POLICY FAVORING ARBITRATION AND PLAINTIFF SIGNED THE AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT DEFENDANT HAS WAIVED HIS RIGHT TO ARBITRATE THIS DISPUTE. DEFENDANT, BY SUBPOENAING DENTAL RECORDS, HAS NOT SUBSTANTIALLY INVOKED THE LITIGATION MACHINERY, AND NO PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF IS SHOWN. THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT SUFFICIENTLY COMPLIES WITH CCP SECTION 1295, AND PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT ALLEGES AN ONGOING RELATIONSHIP SUCH THAT THE AGREEMENT APPLIES TO THIS DISPUTE. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Ntc And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay The Action ;
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Continued To Jul-30-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ALEXANDER VILDERMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY THE ACTION is continued to July 30, 2010. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
